# Events

Internal event bus decoupling producers from consumers.

**Tier:** Foundation

## Modules

| Module | Size | Classes | Functions |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| `lithos.events` | S | 2 | 0 |

## Public API

### `lithos.events`
- class `LithosEvent` ‚Äî A typed event emitted by the Lithos event bus.
- class `EventBus` ‚Äî In-memory event bus with filtered subscriptions and ring buffer history.
